log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Astral Elf — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):7+6=13 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ 1/1 targets affected.
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Astral Elf — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:11+6=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Astral Elf — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:5+6=11 vs DC 15] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 95/99
→ ⚠ Archmage: Charm broken by damage! No longer incapacitated.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Astral Elf — Armored Escapist: FAIL! 24 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Astral Elf — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:9+6=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Astral Elf — Armored Escapist: SUCCESS. 17 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 5 ===

ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:9+6=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 0 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Astral Elf — Armored Escapist: FAIL! 32 fire damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
